note: Explorer fix: LATEST BLOCKS no longer aborts with 'signal is aborted without reason'. The block-fetch loop was 22 sequential RPC calls; a single slow read tripped the 8s per-call AbortController. Now all getblockhash + getblock calls for the page run in parallel and the per-call timeout is 15s, with a clear 'RPC timeout' message instead of the browser default. Wallet: NEW Cancel button on every pending sent TX — full RBF replacement back to the user's own address with a bumped fee (chain already supports it via mempool RBF). Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to pick up both.
